home.title: Frontend web developer
home.bio: Hi, I'm a Frontend Web Developer from Warsaw, Poland. With a master’s degree from the Polish-Japanese Academy of Information Technology I have a blend of formal education and self-taught expertise that allow me to pursue my passion for building web applications that are elegant, interactive and user-friendly. I'm also committed to expanding my knowledge as I believe that continuous learning is key to excelling in this field. Beyond coding, I have an interest in visual arts, particularly digital art and photography. Feel free to explore my portfolio to see some of my recent work and please don't hesitate to get in touch.

listify.description: Listify is a web application that allows users to create and manage easy-to-use shopping lists. The users can add their frequented shops, and add products to them when creating a new list. It was built with React using:
listify.list-item-firebase: Firebase for user and data management
